name: 6 Bottles Olivewood Wine Rack Brown - Threshold™: Countertop Holder, Freestanding, Multi-Compartments, Varnished Wood
description:
Put your collection of wines on display with this 6 Bottles Olivewood Wine Rack from Threshold™. Made from wood with a rectangular silhouette, this freestanding wine rack helps keep your bottles neatly organized. Designed in a brown hue, this wine bottle rack easily integrates with existing decor whether you place it on a table, in your home bar, or anywhere else.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
